name: Pizza Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the popped popcorn in a large bowl.
2. Warm the olive oil in the microwave until heated.
3. Drizzle the warm olive oil over the popcorn.
4. Sprinkle the dry spaghetti sauce powder and grated parmesan cheese evenly over the popcorn.
5. Toss the popcorn gently to coat it thoroughly with the seasonings.
